summary: Program Metrics derived layer API - All 22 backend tests PASSED (100%). Endpoints GET /metrics, POST /recompute-metrics (athlete-only), and POST /recompute-all (admin-only) are fully functional with proper auth/RBAC controls.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/internal/programs/{program_id}/metrics returns cached or recomputed metrics for athlete
VERIFIED: POST /api/internal/programs/{program_id}/recompute-metrics forces recompute for specific program
VERIFIED: POST /api/internal/programs/recompute-all recomputes all active programs (admin-only)
VERIFIED: Metrics response includes all 17 required fields per ProgramMetricsResponse model
VERIFIED: 403 returned for non-athlete users (admin, director, coach) on GET/POST single-program endpoints
VERIFIED: 401 returned for unauthenticated requests on all 3 endpoints
VERIFIED: Recompute-all is admin-only — athlete/coach tokens get 403, director allowed (admin role)
VERIFIED: Cached metrics returned on second GET call (same computed_at timestamp)
VERIFIED: Metrics stored in MongoDB program_metrics collection with unique index on (program_id, tenant_id)
VERIFIED: Numeric fields (meaningful_interaction_count, invite_count, etc.) are non-negative
VERIFIED: data_confidence is one of HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data with programs UF and Stanford
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program Metrics derived layer fully tested. Three endpoints under /api/internal/programs/: GET /{program_id}/metrics (athlete-only, returns cached or fresh metrics), POST /{program_id}/recompute-metrics (athlete-only, forces recompute), POST /recompute-all (admin-only, bulk recompute). Metrics stored in program_metrics MongoDB collection with unique index on (program_id, tenant_id). 6h staleness threshold for cache. Service at /app/backend/services/program_metrics.py computes 17 fields from interactions, program_stage_history, program_signals, coach_flags, director_actions collections. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_program_metrics.py
